message:
feat(fsqlite-mvcc): track pruned version keys for ARC cache eviction (bd-3t3.10)

Add pruned_keys field to PruneResult containing (PageNumber, CommitSeq)
pairs of all freed versions. When ARC is integrated (§6.5-6.7), callers
MUST use these keys to evict entries from ARC indexes and ghost lists to
prevent memory leaks.

Collect keys during the chain-free loop in prune_page_chain() and
propagate them through GcTickResult aggregation across all pages.

New tests:
- test_arc_eviction_on_prune: verify pruned_keys contains correct pairs
  after pruning a single page chain
- test_gc_tick_pruned_keys_aggregated: verify gc_tick aggregates keys
  across multiple pages (2 pruned versions × 3 pages = 6 keys)

Also: rustfmt DMS lock byte let-binding in unix.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
